Navigating Excellence · Shaping the Future
October 1, 2025 · Rosewood Hong Kong
As the global payment and digital entertainment industries enter a new era of deep integration and transformation, we are honored to invite industry leaders, platform founders, and strategic partners from around the world to gather at the pinnacle of Asia—Rosewood Hong Kong—on October 1, 2025, for an exclusive, high-level international summit.
This event is strictly by invitation only, open to a select group of core partners and leading global platform representatives. In a private dining venue overlooking Victoria Harbour, we will engage in in-depth dialogue on innovation, collaboration, and global expansion.
Formal invitations have been delivered to our distinguished guests. Kindly check your inbox.
We firmly believe that true partnerships begin with meaningful connection, and that genuine trust is forged through face-to-face understanding.
This is not merely a night of celebration—it marks the beginning of our next global chapter.

【LGPayment Notice】
Today, while all payment channels in India are under nationwide suspension, 
LGPayment
 remains fully operational with uninterrupted services.
We understand how critical payments are for your business, and no matter the external challenges, 
LGPayment is committed to safeguarding the security and stability of your transactions
.
Thank you for your trust and support.
LGPayment — Your Reliable Payment Partner

Service Rules:

 India Card / UPI

Trading / Customer Support Hours (Beijing Time):
 12:30 - 23:30

Transfer Method:
 
IMPS transfers only
 • 
Frozen Account Notice:
 If an account is frozen, the supplier is 
not responsible
, and the resolution will be based on official notifications.
⸻
Transaction Guidelines
 1. 
Before depositing, confirm with the supplier’s customer support.
 2. 
After transferring funds, send a payment screenshot in the group for manual crediting.

If a deposit is returned
 due to 
supplier account freezing
, the amount 
cannot be refunded
 to the sender’s account. The sender bears all losses. A video proof will be provided within 
30 minutes
.

 will not be covered by the supplier, and the account will remain usable. The deducted amount will not be included in the total transaction volume.

Deposit Limits:
 • 
Minimum single deposit:
 ₹1,000
 • 
Maximum single deposit:
 ₹500,000
 • 
Deposits above ₹100,000 require card verification.
 7. 
If an IMPS deposit is frozen within 30 minutes, the supplier is not responsible.
 8. 
Deposits made outside of working hours are not guaranteed to be settled if the account is frozen.
 9. 
The supplier only processes same-day deposits. Complaints about previous day’s deposits will not be entertained.
⸻

🚫
 • 
AXIS bank same-bank transfers
 • 
Phone transfers
 • 
NEFT mode transfers
 • 
RTGS and NEFT transfers require prior confirmation. Any losses incurred will be the sender’s responsibility.

Use IMPS for transfers. Losses due to other transfer modes will be borne by the sender!
⚠
 
Credit card deposits will not be processed!
